sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root סוּג), Eze 22:18 קרי (where there is the סוּג כתיב), and plur. סִיגִים the refuse, of metal.-(a) scoria, dross; Pro 25:4, הָגֹו סִיגִים מִכֶּסֶף “take away the dross from the silver;” Pro 26:23, כֶּסֶף סִיגִים “silver of dross,” i.e. not yet refined.-(b) baser metal which having been mixed with purer is separated from it by melting (see בְּדִיל ); Eze 22:18, 19 Eze 22:19 Isa 1:22, 25 .

Note. For סִיגִים in many copies, both MS. and printed, there is read סִגִּים Isa 1:22, 25 Eze 22:18, 19 Eze 22:19(compare Lehrg. p. 145), but the former is to be preferred.
